name: Brandied Gorgonzola Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the gorgonzola cheese and sour cream in a bowl until smooth.
2. Add the white pepper and brandy to the mixture.
3. Blend well to ensure all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
5. This recipe makes about 1 1/4 cups of dip, perfect for sharing with friends and family.
